name: Zen Media Preview
description: Live video preview in the sidebar, docked above media controls. Compatible with sidebar-expand-on-hover and compact mode. Automatically hides when the sidebar collapses or when Picture-in-Picture is active.
author: Ardijan

main.uc.js.name: Zen Media Preview
main.uc.js.description: Sidebar video preview – canvas, JSWindowActor registration, and UI logic
